summary: Position an element absolute to a side of the ancestor stacking context.

description.type: Sets element's position type to absolute, fixed, relative, or sticky.

summary: Position an element to a side of the ancestor stacking context.

description.side: Sets element positioned to a specified side
description.size: Sets the offset distance from the specified side, with 0 being flush against the edge and 1-4 applying incremental spacing values from the design system.
